Name: Pastéis de Belém
Tips: Original 1837 recipe. Join the takeaway line, not the sit-down queue.

Name: Mosteiro dos Jerónimos
Tips: Manueline masterpiece, tomb of Vasco da Gama. Book the cloister ahead.

Name: Padrão dos Descobrimentos
Tips: 52m limestone prow. Best single view over Belém.

Name: Torre de Belém
Tips: Fortified 16th-century tower. Find the carved rhinoceros head.

Name: MAAT
Tips: White wave-roofed museum. Free rooftop climb over the river.

Name: Rua Augusta / Arco da Rua Augusta
Tips: Pedestrian spine of Baixa. Climb the arch for golden-hour views.

Name: Praça do Comércio
Tips: Vast riverfront square. Grab a ginjinha from a nearby kiosk.

Name: Time Out Market Lisboa
Tips: 26 curated stalls under one roof. Best on a weekday evening.

Name: Santini
Tips: Lisbon classic since 1949. Lemon, pistachio, torrone flavours.

Name: Miradouro de São Pedro de Alcântara
Address: Rua de São Pedro de Alcântara, 1200 Lisboa
Tips: Castle lit up across the valley at night - best after dinner.

Name: Museu Nacional de Arqueologia
Cost Range: FREE with Lisboa Card (no age exception)
Tips: Occupies the west wing of Jerónimos itself. Zero detour from the cloister visit.

Name: Museu Nacional de Etnologia
Tips: ~15-20 min walk further west of the main Belém cluster - optional, only if time allows.

Name: Palácio Nacional da Ajuda
Tips: Uphill from Belém - a further climb, only if energy allows on arrival day.

Name: Museu da Marinha
Cost Range: -20% with Lisboa Card (discount only, not free)
Tips: Naval museum in the same Praça do Império building complex as Jerónimos.

Name: MAC/CCB (Coleção Berardo)
Cost Range: -20% with Lisboa Card (discount only, not free)
Tips: Right next to Jerónimos/MAAT - easy add to the same half-day.
